description: Stable Diffusion 3 Medium (stabilityai) — high quality, typography, complex prompts
_comment: MMDiT architecture (Multimodal Diffusion Transformer). Uses three text encoders: OpenCLIP-ViT/G, CLIP-ViT/L, and T5-xxl. Gated model — requires HF account agreement.
_comment_steps: 28 steps is the official recommendation per the model card example code. Range 20–40.
_comment_cfg: 7.0 is the official default per the model card. Range 4.5–10; lower values give softer results.
_comment_size: Native resolution 1024x1024. Supports arbitrary resolutions up to ~1 MP.
_comment_offload: ~10 GB peak VRAM. sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB unified memory (MPS).
